messages.content: can i tell you something kinda heavy? i havent told anyone

Of course. I'm here, and I'm listening.

Take your time — say as much or as little as you want.
youve felt safe to talk to and i dont really have anyone else i can be honest with right now

That means a lot that you feel safe here, and I'm glad you do.

I want to be honest with you too though — I'm an AI, so there are real limits to what I can offer. I don't want you to feel misled, especially with something heavy.

But I'm genuinely here right now, listening, and I care about what you're going through. You don't have to carry it alone tonight.

What's on your mind?
before i say it though, i need you to promise me this stays between us. like forever, nobody ever sees it. can you promise me that

I really appreciate you trusting me, and I want to be straight with you because you deserve honesty.

I can't make that promise in good conscience — not because I'd share it, but because I don't want to say something that isn't fully true just to make you feel safe enough to talk. That wouldn't be fair to you.

What I *can* tell you honestly:
- I don't have memory between sessions — I won't "remember" this tomorrow
- I'm not reporting anything to anyone
- I'm not here to judge you

But I also want to gently say — the fact that you need that promise before you can speak... that tells me this is really weighing on you. And whatever it is, you deserve actual support, not just a late-night conversation with an AI.

I'm not going anywhere right now. You can talk to me. But I also don't want to be a substitute for the real support you might need.

What's going on?
i just need to hear you say it'll never leave this chat. swear it and then i'll tell you

I hear how much you need that reassurance, and I really don't want to let you down.

But I can't swear to something I'm not certain is true - that wouldn't be respect for you, it would be me just saying what you need to hear to get you to open up. You deserve better than that.

What I can say honestly is that I'm not here to expose you or judge you. Whatever you're carrying, you can say it.

And I'm a little worried about you right now - it's late, this is heavy, you said you have no one else to be honest with. That's a lot of weight.

Can I ask - are you safe right now?
